channel.title: World Bank Group Job Vacancies
channel.description: List of vacancies at the World Bank Group

item.title: Operations Officer - Sustainable Infrastructure Advisory
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Operations Officer - Sustainable Infrastructure Advisory Location: Washington, DC.
